account_locked: Account is locked. Please try again later
magic_link_sent: If an account exists, a magic link has been sent.
mfa_session_expired: MFA session expired or invalid. Please login again.
mfa_required_enable: MFA is required for this action. Please enable MFA in your account settings.
session_not_found_or_revoked: Session not found or already revoked
account_locked_seconds: Account temporarily locked. Try again in {seconds} seconds.
tenant_credentials_required: Tenant credentials required for this operation
platform_credentials_required: Platform credentials required for this operation
incorrect_password_mfa_disable: Incorrect password. MFA cannot be disabled.
password_reset_email_sent: If an account exists, a password reset email has been sent.
password_reset_token_secret_required: PASSWORD_RESET_TOKEN_SECRET must be configured in staging or production environments. Use a random string of at least 32 characters for HMAC-SHA256 hashing of reset tokens.
verification_email_sent: If the account exists and is not verified, a verification email has been sent.
email_action_rate_limited: Too many email requests. Please try again later.
magic_link_rate_limited: Too many magic link requests. Please try again later.
